schema-extraction.rule: ts-morph walks AST; ts-json-schema-generator builds JSON Schema from TS types; ctx excluded by parameter name match only (no TypeChecker)

schema-composition.rule: data:{} wrapper always present in required[], even for zero-param fns; middleware envelope merged at top level; false override removes field

middleware-types.rule: MiddlewareDef = { id, envelope?, createContext, eventMapping? }; eventMapping keys are selector strings (divergence from reference: reference uses handlerName→string[])

mcp-consumer.rule: ListTools from schema keys; CallTool dispatches via needsEnvelopeField + dispatch(); no per-transport branching in tool-call logic

fastify-routes.rule: POST /<pkgId>/<fnName>; body { data?, ...envelope }; NO Fastify schema validation on body (AJV rejects complex oneOf); dispatch() from @adhd/apigen-runtime

nx-generator-pattern.rule: addProjectConfiguration + generateFiles(__files__ templates) + formatFiles(tree); tags must include layer: and platform:

registry-discovery.rule: fs.readdirSync on packages dir; filter by project.json tags; sort alphabetically; CLI version reads package.json tags/keywords instead

dispatch-single-path.rule: dataParamNames and needsEnvelopeField defined ONLY in dispatch.ts; all plugins import from @adhd/apigen-runtime; no inline reimplementation
